mnemonics: E-R & NAVigate THE database: Elmasri-Ramez & Navathe-Shamkant created the classic E-R model text.
keyPoints: Authors of the highly influential textbook 'Fundamentals of Database Systems'.
Their work is a cornerstone in database education, covering conceptual, logical, and physical design.
The textbook introduces and explains the Entity-Relationship (E-R) model in great detail.
commonMistakes: Mispronouncing or misspelling their names (e.g., 'Elmarsi' or 'Navath').
Confusing them with the creators of the foundational database theories (like Codd), rather than the authors who synthesized and taught them.
Attuting specific data models (like the Relational Model) to them instead of their explanatory textbook work.
